code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut idx = 0
mut current = 0
mut sign = 1
mut has_digit = false
mut result = ""
mut first = true

while i <= n
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  let is_minus = b == 45
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_digit
    current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  else if is_minus and not has_digit
    sign = -1
  else if is_ws
    if has_digit
      let value = current * sign
      if idx % 2 == 0
        if first
          result = "#{value}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{value}"
        end
      end
      idx = idx + 1
      current = 0
      sign = 1
      has_digit = false
    end
  end

  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
